title: Iran shows government buildings destroyed by US-Israeli strikes
fullText: NewsFeedUS and Israeli strikes destroyed a diplomatic police centre and a state-owned cultural institute in Tehran, footage from an Iranian government-organised media tour shows. At least 787 people have been killed in Iran since the start of the attacks.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: US and Israeli strikes destroyed a diplomatic police centre and a state-owned cultural institute in Tehran.
